mapper.insert: INSERT INTO program_info (programId, programName, programUrl, sortOrder, useYn) VALUES (#{programId}, #{programName}, #{programUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE program_info SET programName = #{programName}, programUrl = #{programUrl}, sortOrder = #{sortOrder}, useYn = #{useYn}, updatedDate = NOW() WHERE programId = #{programId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM program_info WHERE programId = #{programId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu_info WHERE programId = #{programId}

SELECT programId, programName, programUrl, useYn, sortOrder FROM program_info
AND programId LIKE CONCAT('%', #{programId}, '%')
AND programName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{programName}, '%')
AND programUrl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{programUrl}, '%')
ORDER BY sortOrder, programId
SELECT CONCAT('PGM', LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(programId, 4) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0')) FROM program_info WHERE programId REGEXP '^PGM[0-9]+$'
